author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Zero-copy reshape via view_reshape (Arc-shared storage) eliminated 144 clone_buffer roundtrips per token. 50 tokens now in 64s (1.3s/tok). Total speedup from original: ~10x. Remaining overhead: (1) softmax ensure_cpu/restore_device (2) scale/mask tensor creation per forward call (could cache), (3) permute_0213 kernel launches, (4) LayerNorm ensure_cpu/restore_device.
